reviews.review_title: Barebones and rushed game but good devs.
reviews.review_description: The only good things about the game itself, is the developers. They are very kind and nice people. But that's where the good stuff ends. Exitless shouldn't have released in a early stage as it is right now. Even though the game is advertised to be in "Early Access", that alone isn't a excuse for a game that feels like in "PRE-PRE-PRE ALPHA". There is no content, only 1 level, 1 monster entity and that's it. There's no comfort options and multiplayer doesn't even work (even though that the game is advertised to have multiplayer). You can't release a game that is literally is a demo in it's core and then promise to update the game in the future, game development doesn't work like that. In my opinion, they should of kept working on the game and then release it later. By releasing the game early, you already tarnished the first impressions of people who were expecting a good experience.

I cant complain too much about this game cuz its still in development but it is no doubt one of the better backrooms vr games ive played. and as the updates come i belive the game will only get better. So if you enjoy liminal vr games this one is one you should look into
when you get found by bacteria, it is faster and when you get killed, you don't come back

I got this game thinking it would be fun for me and my brothers but it ducks there wasn't a tutorial and even tho it says multiplayer coop there is no multiplayer i would no recommend this game to anyone.
This would’ve gotten 2 stars but i gave 3 bc miku figure at the start. When you die there’s no respawning, there’s not even a lobby. Fix the respawn and add the multiplayer and it’ll be great
Game is good but add more levels. After all game is 10/10 so make your dreams come true and keep working i belive in you
